zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Bellard於1311年出生在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特薩爾福德時，她的父親James Bellard27歲，母親Letitia Preston23歲。她於1328年與Sir Thomas Talbot II在英國越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1378年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Bellard于1311年出生在英国英格兰格亞特 曼徹斯特薩爾福德时，她的父亲James Bellard27岁，母亲Letitia Preston23岁。她于1328年与Sir Thomas Talbot II在英国越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1378年在英国英格兰藍卡爾享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bellard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Leonce, Albon, Laurent, Orelia, Vernice.

English: apparently a derivative of Old French and Middle English belle + the suffix -ard, but the sense of belle is uncertain. It might be the female personal name Belle ‘beautiful’, the adjective belle ‘fine, beautiful’, or the noun belle ‘bell’ (see Bell ), in which case the surname might be synonymous with beller ‘bell-ringer or bell-maker’ (see Beller ).

variants.name: Berard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Emile, Leandre, Normand, Antoine, Armand, Laurent, Pierre, Adrien, Alcide, Amiee, Andre.
French (Bérard): from the ancient Germanic personal name Berhard, composed of the elements ber(n) ‘bear’ and hard ‘hard, strong’.
History: Gabriel Bérard dit Lépine from Château-du-Loir in Sarthe, France, married Geneviève Hayot in QC in 1673. His descendants also bear the surname see Lepine .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Bellard was born in 1311, in Salford, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom, her father, James Bellard, was 27 and her mother, Letitia Preston, was 23. She married Sir Thomas Talbot II in 1328, in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1378, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Bellard est née en 1311, à Salford, Greater Manchester, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Bellard, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Letitia Preston, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Talbot II en 1328, à Bashall Eaves, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1378, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bellardが1311年にイギリスイギリスグレアター マンチェスターサルフォードで生まれた時，父James Bellardは27歳，母Letitia Prestonは23歳であった。1328年にイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベスでSir Thomas Talbot IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1378年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bellard(이)가 1311년 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 살퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Bellard(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Letitia Preston(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1328년 영국 요르크실르 배샤 이브스에서 Sir Thomas Talbot II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Bellard родилась в 1311 г. в местности салфорд, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Bellard было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Letitia Preston, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Talbot II в 1328 г. в местности башолл эавесь, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1378 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.
